stemHtml:
Refer to figure or Tromso, Norway (ENTC) SID chart 10-3A from the Jeppesen GSPRM 2017.
According to your calculations, your aircraft can climb with a gradient of 6.5% up to 4000 ft. Considering your aircraft's performance, which route should you take when departing from Tromso?

options.a: TC707, TC708, TC710, LOMVI with a speed restriction of 185 kt up to TC707
options.b: TC707, TC708, TC710, LOMVI with a speed restriction of 185 kt up to TC708
options.c: TC707, TC704, TC706, BAREG with a speed restriction of 185 kt up to TC707 then 210 kt up to TC704
options.d: TC707, TC704, TC706, BAREG with a speed restriction of 210 kt up to TC704
